props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Mini-Split Systems in {city}

faqs.question: What is a mini-split system and how does it work?
faqs.answer: A mini-split system is a ductless heating and cooling solution with an outdoor compressor and one or more indoor air-handling units. They provide zone-based climate control without the need for ductwork, making them ideal for additions, older homes, or specific rooms.

faqs.question: Are mini-split systems energy efficient?
faqs.answer: Yes, mini-splits are highly energy efficient. They avoid the energy losses associated with ductwork and allow you to heat or cool only the rooms you're using, which can significantly reduce your energy bills.

faqs.question: How many rooms can a mini-split system serve?
faqs.answer: A single outdoor unit can typically support up to 4-5 indoor units, each independently controlled. This allows you to create custom comfort zones throughout your home with a single system.
